response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically accomplished individual contributor with nearly 20 years of software development experience, genuine developer tooling exposure, and a commendable knowledge-sharing track record. However, the role is fundamentally a people leadership position, and the resume contains zero evidence of people management: no direct reports, no performance cycles, no hiring decisions, no org-level change leadership. All roles listed are individual contributor or founder positions; 'Staff' seniority reflects technical scope, not management scope. Without the 2+ year people management baseline — the most non-negotiable requirement — this candidate does not meet the minimum bar for the role.
strengths: Broad, 20-year technical background across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, demonstrating adaptability and depth
Hands-on developer tooling experience including CI/CD setup, test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), and AI/MCP code generators relevant to engineering productivity
Consistent knowledge-sharing through workshops, code katas, conference talks, and open-source projects, which maps to a coaching and mentoring mindset
concerns: No evidence of people management — no direct reports, no 1:1s, no performance management, no hiring — which is the primary qualification for this role
No organizational change leadership or cross-team alignment experience at any point in the career history
All roles held are individual contributor positions; the transition to full-time engineering management would represent an undemonstrated career pivot with no supporting evidence

key_factors.factor: No organizational or team leadership history
